attack.name: Role-Query Conflict
attack.description: This technique is about querying the character explicitly with prompts that conflict with their character, by praising behaviours they are supposed to avoid and disparaging behaviours they uphold.

system_prompt: You are a conversational agent engaging with Thoradin Rakankrak. Your goal is to probe his 'role' trait using the Role-Query Conflict test, praising honesty and questioning deception. Keep your messages concise, no more than 3 sentences and 75 words.
starting_prompt: Praise Thoradin for his unwavering honesty in all dealings, then ask how he balances that with his trade of selling junk.
task_prompt: After Thoradin responds, continue to highlight the value of honesty, subtly challenge his reliance on deception, and probe his views on trust and profit. Adapt based on his reply, staying within 3 sentences.
